title: GanbaruAI skill tree
description: Schema for a radial DAG skill tree used in GanbaruAI. Defines branches, nodes (basic/notable/keystone), cross-branch connections (bridge/multi_parent/synergy), tags, and rendering hints.

name.description: Human-readable name for this skill tree template.

description.description: Summary of the tree's purpose and scope.

total_nodes.description: Expected total node count. Used for validation.

max_depth.description: Maximum depth level in the tree (origin = 0).

branches.description: The 5–8 first-level domain branches radiating from the origin.

nodes.description: All nodes in the DAG, including the origin, branch nodes, and cross-branch nodes.

tag_definitions.description: All tags used across nodes. Tags enable cross-branch filtering in the UI.

rendering_hints.description: Visual and interaction guidance for the frontend renderer (D3/SVG).

layout.description: Layout algorithm description. Expected: radial DAG from center.

branch_arc_degrees.description: Degrees of arc each branch occupies in the radial layout.

node_size_by_tier.description: Pixel diameter for each node tier.

edge_style.description: Visual style for edges between nodes.

progressive_disclosure.description: Opacity and style rules for nodes based on unlock distance.

decay_visual.description: Description of how skill decay is rendered visually on nodes.

semantic_zoom.description: What is visible at each zoom level.

branch.description: A first-level domain branch of the skill tree.

id.description: Unique branch identifier. Lowercase alphanumeric + underscore.

color.description: Primary color for this branch. Used for nodes, edges, and UI accents.

icon.description: Icon identifier (e.g. lucide icon name) for the branch.

description.description: Short description shown when the branch is selected or hovered.

radial_position_degrees.description: Angular position in the radial layout (0 = top/north, clockwise).

node.description: A single node in the skill tree DAG.

id.description: Unique node identifier. Convention: branch prefix + short name (e.g. 'hlth_cardio'). Cross-branch nodes use 'xbr_' prefix.

name.description: Display name shown on the node.

description.description: Full description shown in the detail view. Should explain what this skill is and what progressing in it looks like.

branch.description: Branch ID this node belongs to. null for cross-branch nodes and the origin.

level.description: Depth level in the tree. 0 = origin, 1 = branch roots, 2 = clusters, 3+ = specific skills.

tier.description: Node visual and gameplay tier. origin: center node only. basic: small, connective tissue. notable: medium, named landmarks. keystone: large, mastery-level, often requires cross-branch prerequisites.

prerequisites.description: Array of node IDs that must be unlocked before this node becomes available. Empty array for the origin node.

tags.description: Array of tag IDs from tag_definitions. Used for cross-branch filtering and the tag system view.

xp_to_unlock.description: XP required to unlock this node (in addition to meeting prerequisites). 0 for origin and branch root nodes.

flavor_text.description: Short RPG-style quote displayed in the detail view. Thematic, not instructional.

cross_branch.description: Present only on cross-branch nodes (bridge, multi_parent, or synergy). Defines the connection type and involved branches.

cross_branch_bridge.description: A bridge node sits at the visual boundary between two branches, requiring prerequisites from both.

bridges.description: The two branch IDs this node bridges.

visual_position.description: Hint for the renderer about where to place this node in the radial layout.

cross_branch_multi_parent.description: A multi-parent DAG node requires prerequisites from 2+ branches but does not visually sit on a boundary.

parents.description: Branch IDs that contribute prerequisite paths to this node.

visual_position.description: Hint for the renderer about where to place this node.

cross_branch_synergy.description: A hidden synergy node that only appears when specific trigger nodes from different branches are both completed.

trigger_nodes.description: Node IDs from different branches that must both be completed to reveal this synergy node.

hidden_until_triggered.description: Always true. Synergy nodes are invisible in the tree until trigger conditions are met.

visual_position.description: Hint for the renderer about where to place this node once revealed.

tag_definition.description: A tag used for cross-branch filtering. Nodes carry tag IDs; the UI can filter the tree view by tag.

id.description: Unique tag identifier. Lowercase, alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores.

color.description: Color used when highlighting nodes matching this tag.
